headline: While Amazon, Microsoft, Google Struggle With AI On Land — China Looks To The Sea
summary: The AI race is running into an unexpected wall—and it's not chips or capital. It's water, power, and local resistance. As Amazon.com, Inc., Microsoft Corporation, and Alphabet Inc. push to expand data center capacity, investors are starting to question whether the physical footprint of AI is becoming the real constraint. headline: Swedish Court Reschedules Delivery of Judgment in PriceRunner vs Google Antitrust Case

headline: Why Hut 8 (HUT) Is Up 31.8% After Google AI Deal And $10 Billion Data Center Plan
summary: In early April 2026, Hut 8’s pivot toward large-scale AI and compute infrastructure gained momentum as it advanced the US$10.00 billion, 245 MW River Bend data center and secured a 15-year leasing deal with Google that could reach up to US$17.70 billion in revenue if all renewal options are exercised. headline: Broadcom Higher Amid Alphabet Partnership After Earnings Beat
summary: Broadcom  flashed a death cross recently but its outlook is brightening after the stock soared past its 50-day moving average in recent days amid news of a partnership with Google parent Alphabet.  On Tuesday, the artificial intelligence chip leader revealed a new partnership with Alphabet to make tensor processing units.  Now, Broadcom stock is making its way toward a buy point of 414.61 in a consolidation base, according to Investor's Business Daily's MarketSurge.

content.title: Broadcom Higher Amid Alphabet Partnership After Earnings Beat
content.summary: Broadcom  flashed a death cross recently but its outlook is brightening after the stock soared past its 50-day moving average in recent days amid news of a partnership with Google parent Alphabet.  On Tuesday, the artificial intelligence chip leader revealed a new partnership with Alphabet to make tensor processing units.  Now, Broadcom stock is making its way toward a buy point of 414.61 in a consolidation base, according to Investor's Business Daily's MarketSurge.

headline: Is Microsoft Stock A Smarter Buy Than Google After Its Massive 250% Rally?
summary: Alphabet's (GOOG) stock is up by over 250% since the beginning of 2023. That’s great for Google. But wait a minute, Microsoft’s (MSFT) stock is up a meager 56% during the same period. Hard to believe, but Alphabet’s stock is up more than 4x Microsoft’s stock. This, despite the fact that Microsoft’s revenue growth for the 2023-2025 period stood at 44%, compared to just 31% for Google. Does that make sense? We don’t think it does, and believe Microsoft presents a compelling valuation at current le

New IP Targets Last-Inch Delivery Gap According to Arrive AI, the patent enables several users share a single Arrive Point, an AI-powered secure receptacle. summary: Alphabet and Intel announced an expanded multi year collaboration to co develop custom data center infrastructure processors and to use Intel's next generation Xeon chips across Google Cloud's infrastructure. The partnership focuses on scaling AI workloads, power and cooling efficiency, and data center performance as Alphabet continues its large AI related buildout. The news comes as Google faces rising scrutiny over energy and water use tied to its growing network of data...

headline: The Quantum Computing ETF That Could Be Bigger Than AI, and 2 Tech Funds Riding the Same Wave
summary: Quantum computing is no longer a physics experiment. headline: Inside the S&P 500’s 7-Day Rally: How Two Chip Stocks Fueled the Surge
summary: The  may be on a hot streak but some of its stocks are absolutely on fire.  The index has climbed for seven consecutive days through Thursday’s close—up 7.6% over that period—its longest winning streak since October.  Intel  stock is the best performer over the S&P 500’s streak, climbing 50%.
